descriptor: 22 Strong helps veterans, underprivileged youth, and people facing financial barriers access high-quality recovery care — at no cost.
address: 4120 Birch St, Suite 106, Newport Beach, CA 92660

monthly.default: ${amount}/mo keeps recovery access open for someone who needs it — every month.
monthly.25: $25/mo — one recovery session for one participant, every month.
monthly.50: $50/mo — two targeted care sessions for one participant each month.
monthly.100: $100/mo — a full month of mobility and strength support for one participant.
monthly.250: $250/mo — a complete block of integrated care for one participant each month.
monthly.500: $500/mo — sponsor one participant through their monthly recovery plan.
monthly.1000: $1,000/mo — help underwrite an entire participant cohort, month after month.

oneTime.default: A ${amount} gift opens the door to recovery care for someone who couldn't access it alone.
oneTime.25: A $25 gift covers one recovery session for one participant.
oneTime.50: A $50 gift funds two sessions of targeted care.
oneTime.100: A $100 gift supports a month of mobility and strength care for one participant.
oneTime.250: A $250 gift covers a full block of strength and mobility care.
oneTime.500: A $500 gift sponsors one participant through a full recovery cycle.
oneTime.1000: A $1,000 gift helps underwrite an entire participant cohort.
